findings.message: rename_item writes item.name directly and commits without recomputing the derived slug. slug is documented (models.py) as always derived from name via _make_slug and must stay in sync, but this write path persists a stale slug that diverges from the new name. The repository already provides update_item_name which keeps both in sync; the route bypasses it.
findings.suggestion: Call repository.update_item_name(session, item_id, payload.name) instead of mutating item.name inline, or set item.slug = _make_slug(payload.name) before committing so the derived field stays consistent with name.
